provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, enormous man in bulky powered exoskeleton armor covered in imperial eagles and purity seals and gothic cathedral elements, a massive chainsaw sword in one hand and a bolt pistol in the other, every surface is engraved with religious text and skull motifs, a cape flowing behind him, the armor alone weighs more than three normal crew members combined
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Bulky powered exoskeleton with imperial eagles, purity seals, gothic elements, chainsaw sword. Warhammer 40k power fantasy. Violates all five art pillars.
